Below is a set of screen options that you 
can choose from depending on the style of 
Modpack or your play style. 

Do note that you can change such within the 
Accessories Config if the given option is not 
to your liking.

text.config.accessories.category.clientO: Contains more generic client side options for rendering or player input
text.config.accessories.category.content: Contains more content focused options like glider and totem equippablity
text.config.accessories.category.screenO: Options to control the hovered entry rendering effects.
Contains all screen configuration options for all variants and injected button offset
Options to control the non hovered entries rendering effects.
text.config.accessories.option.clientOpt: Disables the error message displayed if the accessories
screen is opened and no used slots were found.
Impostazioni predefinite per utenti con disabilità
Disables the included default renderer rendering of items if being used.
Changes the mode used to quickly equip a stack from your hand.
Forces any registered render found to be no
rendering to instead use default rendering.
Enables/Disables the rendering of cosmetic item variants if equipped.
text.config.accessories.option.contentOp: Permettere l'utilizzo di banner come elementi di equipaggiamento.
Toggles the ability for Banners to be equipped within Accessories Slots.
Toggles the ability for Gliders to be equipped within Accessories Slots.
Toggles the ability for Totems to be equipped within Accessories Slots.
Adds the slots to which a Banner item is allowed to be equipped.
Adds the slots to which a Glider item is allowed to be equipped.
Adds the slots to which a Totem item is allowed to be equipped.
text.config.accessories.option.disabledD: Renditori predefiniti per utenti con disabilità
Useful to disable default rendering for a given slot either
for specifically block or/and item renderings
text.config.accessories.option.modifiers:
Useful to add offset values to a given slot type without
needing a datapack as it allows for both positive or
negative offset value.
text.config.accessories.option.screenOpt: Abilitare la griglia di creazione nella barra laterale
If group filters are not present, it will attempt to put
the crafting grid within the sidebar instead down below.
Abilita lo scorrimento nelle fessure dello schermo
Useful if the given mod allows for scrolling stacks
leading to issues when going though accessories.
Mostrare sempre la griglia di creazione.
Will remove the toggle button for the crafting grid and always show it within the experimental screen.
Chiudere la schermata invece di tornare alla schermata precedente.
Tentativo di chiudere lo schermo invece di tornare alla schermata precedente dell'inventario, qualora possibile.

otherwise it allows for manual rotation of the entity.
